name: liquor-kings
description: Liquor Kings monorepo — root scripts for diagnostics

scripts.test:ci: npm ci --prefix services/api && npm exec --prefix services/api -- playwright install chromium && env SUPABASE_URL=https://ci-safe.example.invalid/supabase SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=ci-invalid-anon-key SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=ci-invalid-service-role npm exec --prefix services/api -- vitest run -r services/api --exclude "**/*.smoke.test.js"
scripts.safety:lk:rpa-local: npm run doctor:lk:mlcc-dry-run && npm run test:ci && npm run verify:lk:rpa-safety
